sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root שָׁתָה) with suff. מִשְׁתָּיו Dan 1:5, מִשְׁתֵּיהֶם verse 16 (both sing.); מִשְׁתֵּיבֶם verse 10 .

(1) a drinking (das Trinken), Est 5:4 7:2 בֵּית מִשְׁתֵּה הַיַּיִן banqueting room, 7:8 יִיִן מִשְׁתָּיו “wine of his drinking,” i.e. which the king drank, Dan 1:5.

(2) drink (Trank), Dan 1:10 Ezr 3:7.

(3) banquet, συμπόσιον, Est 1:3 2:18 8:17 .

משתה

emphat. st. מִשְׁתְּיָה, Chald. id. Dan 5:10.
